creator: freebsd@oldach.net
text:
ports r458987 is broken, as the naive removal of the "for in in ${cpus}" loop renders ${i} (used in "/dev/cpuctl${i}") undefined. So this command will always fail.

Secondly, the -e option of cpucontrol(1) is not available in STABLE and below, so it should be guarded with OSVERSION anyhow.
